typecheck.reason: Production implementation blocked before source changes because required generated SDK contract is absent.

lint.reason: Production implementation blocked before source changes because required generated SDK contract is absent.

tests.reason: Behavioral CT tests would need to mock missing SDK fields/functions that do not exist in production.

probe_commands.command: rg -n "governance.*commit|commit.*governance|Governance.*Commit|governanceCommit|governance_commit|pendingCount|hasAdminWrite" packages/but-sdk/src/generated/index.d.ts packages/but-sdk/src/generated/index.js crates packages apps/desktop/src -g '!target' -g '!node_modules'
probe_commands.finding: No generated SDK governance commit function, pendingCount field, or hasAdminWrite field found. Tauri-only governance_pending exists outside the generated SDK.
Tauri registers governance_pending, but packages/but-sdk generated output exports only governanceStatusRead.

requirement_results.reason: Four-tab shell depends on parent store and read-only contract, but source was not changed after required SDK blocker was confirmed.
Generated SDK lacks governance commit function.
No renderer config write code was added.
No read-only derivation code was added; required hasAdminWrite field is missing.
Generated SDK status lacks hasAdminWrite, so role-independent read-only behavior cannot be implemented honestly.
Pending store cannot be implemented honestly without generated SDK pendingCount/commit contract.
